lead: Figures on this page are verified against the sources below.

sources.label: Coriolis
sources.what: Interactive outfitting & build planner, preloaded for this ship — used to plan the AX shield-tank fit.

sources.label: Elite Dangerous (official)
sources.what: Frontier's official Imperial Cutter ship page — manufacturer specs, hardpoint layout, and the ship render used on this page.

sources.label: EDCD coriolis-data
sources.what: Ship slot layout, military/optional internals, and engineering blueprint data behind the AX loadout.

sources.label: Inara — Imperial Cutter
sources.what: Ship reference page: base stats, shield/armour figures, price, and hardpoint & module slot layout for AX planning.

sources.label: Fandom wiki
sources.what: Imperial Cutter ship article: role profile, Gutamaya manufacture, and the Imperial Duke rank requirement.
